seo.title: Foreign National Loans | Green Street Capital
seo.description: Mortgage options for foreign national buyers purchasing U.S. property. Specialty lender programs. NMLS #2066586.

hero.heading: Foreign National Loans
hero.subheading: Specialty financing discussions for foreign national buyers of U.S. residential property.

intro.heading: Buying in the U.S. as a Foreign National
paragraphs: Foreign national financing typically requires larger down payments, strong reserves, and specialized lender overlays. Credit may be evaluated differently when U.S. credit history is limited.
We coordinate with lenders experienced in these files and set expectations early about documentation, timelines, and cash to close.
bullets: Non-U.S. citizens purchasing investment or second homes (program-dependent)
Buyers with limited U.S. credit history

sidebar.heading: Plan for Higher Cash Requirements
sidebar.body: Down payment and reserve expectations are often higher than for domestic primary-residence loans.

programs.title: Foreign National Purchase
programs.description: Programs designed for non-resident buyers where available.

programs.title: Investment Property
programs.description: Financing rentals subject to investor and foreign-national overlays.

programs.title: Entity Purchases
programs.description: Select lenders allow certain entity structures—case by case.

programs.title: Full Documentation Support
programs.description: Help organizing income, banking, and identification documents.

faqs.question: Do I need a U.S. credit score?
faqs.answer: Not always. Some programs use alternative credit or foreign credit references. Requirements vary widely.

cta.heading: Explore foreign national options
cta.body: Speak with our team before you go under contract so financing is realistic.
